# bigideasfinal

Team name - Life

Team members and their email addresses - Kosisochukwu Edoziem (kse27@pitt.edu), Eric Lutz (evr66@pitt.edu), Mauricio Alemany (mea316@pitt.edu)

**Description and links to the datasets used**
Traffic dataset- Displays the different neighborhoods in Pittsburgh and gives metrics on average daily car count, average daily car count,  percent of people going over the speed limit.
https://data.wprdc.org/dataset/traffic-count-data-city-of-pittsburgh/resource/6dfd4f8f-cbf5-4917-a5eb-fd07f4403167 
Safety Datasets- Gives the population of each neighborhood in Pittsburgh along with a blotter of all criminal activity, categorized by neighborhood and month/year.


Crime: https://data.wprdc.org/datastore/dump/044f2016-1dfd-4ab0-bc1e-065da05fca2e
Neighborhoods:https://data.wprdc.org/dataset/pgh/resource/b7156251-6036-4b68-ad2a-95566c84343e


Smart trash dataset - displays each time a smart trash is located in a Pittsburgh neighbourhood, as well as container_id and receptacle_model_id.
https://data.wprdc.org/dataset/smart-trash-containers


**A one sentence overview of your repository, meant for someone who is not familiar with the project**

Our project aims to find the neighborhood with the best quality of life in Pittsburgh through the measures of crime, traffic, and smart trashcans in every Pittsburgh city.
